data.content: Implementation review approved. The Diagnostics rename, Runtime/Leases tab split, client/server perf instrumentation, diagnostics ingest endpoint, profiler coverage, baseline harness, and unit tests all match the knot description and acceptance criteria. Sanity gates were rechecked on the implementation branch: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build passed. I did not find acceptance-criteria regressions or review blockers.
